## Epic 0 — Infrastructure (#5)

**Dependency:** #1
**Est. Effort:** Small

### Goal
Write AGENTS.md and .github/copilot-instructions.md so that AI coding assistants understand the project structure, design principles, and behavioral guidelines.

### Success Criteria
- AGENTS.md covers: build commands, source of truth hierarchy, architecture, chapter dependency rules, contribution workflow, key design decisions, and behavioral guidelines
- copilot-instructions.md covers: project overview, key files, design principles, agent behavioral guidelines, issue workflow, and dependency chain
- Both files reflect the actual state of the repo (not aspirational)

### Tasks
- [ ] Review existing AGENTS.md — update if any gaps found
- [ ] Review existing copilot-instructions.md — update if any gaps found
- [ ] Ensure the CLAUDE.md behavioral guidelines (Think Before Writing, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, Goal-Driven Execution) are included in both files
- [ ] Add any missing gotchas or conventions discovered during Epic 0 setup
- [ ] Commit both files to main

### Reference
- Neon Relic's AGENTS.md: `../neon-relic/AGENTS.md`
- Neon Relic's copilot-instructions.md: `../neon-relic/.github/copilot-instructions.md`
